summary: Plan only: keep #44291 as the live canonical issue. Keep #91610 related as the linked implementation PR, but do not recommend merge, fixed-by-candidate closeout, or a replacement fix because merge/fix actions are blocked and the PR still has unresolved proof and review-bot blockers.
